release.title: New object action added to the Opportunity page.
release.subtitle: Users can now click Mark At Risk from the top-right action area, update the record, and see the refreshed values without leaving the page.
release.closeTitle: Action demos become JSON, not one-off videos.
release.closeSubtitle: The same template can demo buttons, update fields, save behavior, validation messaging, and after-save state from a safe org snapshot.

action.label: Mark At Risk
action.summary: Use this action when an opportunity needs manager attention before the next forecast call.

fields.label: Risk Note
fields.after: Customer requested discount approval before signature.

testing: Button appears in the Opportunity highlights panel action area
Action modal contains the configured update fields
Save path shows the success toast and refreshed values
Regression check: existing record fields still render correctly
